/usr/bin/cc -g -Wl,-Map=mem.map -mcpu=18F06Q40 -Wl,--defsym=__MPLAB_BUILD=1 -mdfp=/Users/kevinlu/.mchp_packs/Microchip/PIC18F-Q_DFP/1.28.451/xc8 -fno-short-double -fno-short-float -memi=wordwrite -O0 -fasmfile -maddrqual=ignore -mwarn=-3 -Wa,-a -msummary=-psect,-class,+mem,-hex,-file -ginhx32 -Wl,--data-init -mno-keep-startup -mno-download -mno-default-config-bits -std=c99 -gdwarf-3 -mstack=compiled:auto:auto:auto -Wl,--memorysummary,memoryfile.xml
